content.en:
In the following days, Ye Tian mainly studied the space-time control technique.

If he can create a true space-time control technique, he can be regarded as a true fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Time passed slowly, and year after year passed.

With Ye Tian's qualifications and talents, coupled with his understanding and perception of space-time fusion, after spending thousands of realms and river years, he finally created a space-time control technique.

This space-time mastery technique can be called an upgraded version of the Void Touch, which completely brings out the mysteries of space-time fusion.

He named his new space-time mastery technique 3,000 Void Hands, and once it was cast, he used his space-time domain to evolve 3,000 hands containing space-time control power to bombard and kill enemies.

Although the three thousand void hands are not the top space-time control skills, they have reached the level of space-time control skills.

With the creation of the Three Thousand Void Hands, Ye Tian's aura had completely changed, and he was even more comfortable using his own power.

"It's time to go to the Halftooth Secret Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, one of Ye Tian's replica bodies set out and headed for the Half-Tooth Secret Domain.

......

Entrance to the Half-Tooth Secret Realm.

Ye Tian came here, and at this time, the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda had long since escaped into an unknown time and space, and there were no other peak Legendary Realm lords here.

After Ye Tian came to these 720 miles, he took out the token of the half-tooth secret domain.

Immediately, Ye Tian urged this token.

The next moment, a huge circle appeared, and the entrance was in the circle.

Ye Tian walked into the magic circle with the token in hand, and the magic circle sucked the token away, and Ye Tian's body instantly passed through the entrance and entered the half-tooth secret domain.

The Halftooth Secret Domain was very large, and when Ye Tian entered here, he sensed a vast and boundless territory.

Moreover, in the half-tooth secret domain, there is a special aura, if you cultivate here, I am afraid that it will have huge benefits, and I don't know how many times better than the cultivation environment in the outside world.

"The value of such a treasure land as the Half Tooth Secret Domain is too great, if it weren't for the Half Tooth Masters occupying it, there would be many Eternal Masters who want to occupy this place. "

Ye Tian muttered.

For him, the more valuable ones are the Ancient Secret Spring and the Ancient Secret Leaf.

Ye Tian was going to go to the Ancient Secret Tree first and take away the Ancient Secret Leaf, after all, the Ancient Secret Leaf was also a very precious life-saving thing for him, such a good thing was naturally the first time to get it.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through the Ancient Secret Domain, and soon came to the Ancient Secret Tree.

The Ancient Secret Tree is not too big, but it seems to be in an endless time and space, and every leaf seems to be in the same time and space.

Moreover, the Half-Tooth Masters have arranged a terrifying magic circle here in the Ancient Secret Tree, and if anyone dares to try to take this Ancient Secret Tree, it will lead to the suppression of the Array, and unless it is the Eternal Master, they will all die.

Ye Tian naturally didn't dare to try to fight against the killing array here, he reached out into a time and space, and with a light pick, he plucked a piece of ancient secret leaf.

Then, he was ostracized by the circle here, and he couldn't stay here anymore.

He wanted to take the second Ancient Secret Leaf, but he couldn't do it.

Afterwards, Ye Tian left here and headed for the Ancient Secret Spring.

The Ancient Secret Spring is located in the Ancient Secret Mountain, which is a mysterious sacred mountain that connects to the origin of the Ancient Secret Domain, and even if you don't enter the Ancient Secret Spring, if you cultivate next to the Ancient Secret Spring, it will be of great benefit.

Soon, Ye Tian arrived at the Ancient Secret Spring.

I saw that on the top of the Ancient Secret Mountain, there was a huge spring, and this spring was the Ancient Secret Spring.

And at this spring, there are three peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Of course, there is no Ou Yu Lord among them, and Ou Yu Lord is afraid that he has already come in and left.

There is a high probability that these three peak Legendary Realm lords are the peak Legendary Realm lords of the Half-Tooth Giant City, and they have some relationship with the half-tooth master before they can get the permission to enter here, after all, if you want to enter here, you don't have to pass the sixth level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

However, if outsiders want to enter, they can only pass through the sixth level of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower.

Ye Tian came here and attracted the attention of these three peak Legendary Realm Lords.

"Your Excellency is Endless Lord Ye Tian, right?"

One of the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords was immediately surprised when he saw Ye Tian.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

The three of them said respectfully.

After all, Ye Tian is the first demonic genius in history to break through the ninth level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower, and now Ye Tian's cultivation has been promoted to the fifth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, and his future potential is unlimited, and there is even a great possibility that he will be promoted to the Eternal Controller.

Therefore, they naturally have to be polite.

Ye Tian chatted briefly with the three of them and knew their names.

Bina, Youhe, Su Ying.

Lord Bina introduced Ye Tian: "Endless Lord, the Ancient Secret Spring is of great help to the promotion of the Supreme Legendary Body, but the deeper you go into the depths of the Ancient Secret Spring, the better the effect, the Ancient Secret Spring has a strong suppression of us, if the physical body is not too strong, if you force it in, the body will be shattered, then the gain will outweigh the loss." "

"Thanks for the promotion!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, Lord Bina and the three of them continued to cultivate in the Ancient Secret Spring, and Ye Tian was also going to cultivate.

After all, he could only practice in the Ancient Secret Domain for one Boundary River Year, and once he reached a Boundary River Year, he would be expelled from the Ancient Secret Domain, so time was very limited.

So, he immediately entered the Ancient Secret Spring and went deeper down.

Compared to that, the three of them were almost cultivating at 30,000 kilometers, 35,000 miles, and 40,000 kilometers, and Ye Tian wanted to go deeper.

10,000 km!

20,000 km!

30,000 km!

By this time, he had already crossed the Lord of the River and continued to go deeper.

Moreover, the oppression he felt was not too great.

Ye Tian knew that this was because he had cultivated the secret of swallowing, his life level surpassed those top realm river lifeforms, and his physical strength was second only to that of the Eternal Master, so he was not afraid of this level of suppression.

Keep digging deeper.

Soon, he surpassed 40,000 kilometers.

At this time, Lord Bina, who was cultivating under the 40,000-kilometer Ancient Secret Spring, was shocked.

The reason why he was able to stay at a distance of 40,000 kilometers was entirely because his strength was at the top of the fifth level peak Legendary Realm Lord, and he was only one step away from being a half-step Eternal Master, how powerful his physical body was!

But why was Ye Tian able to surpass him?

"It's worthy of being a demon who can break through the ninth level of the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower!"

Lord Bina and the other three peak Legendary Realm Lords exclaimed in their hearts.

50,000 km!

60,000 km!

70,000 km!

80,000 km!

......

The depth of the Ancient Secret Spring is 100,000 kilometers, and every time it goes deeper, the suppressive force is doubled.

However, Ye Tian finally forcibly came to a depth of 100,000 kilometers with his almost perverted physical body.

And the ancient secret spring here is the richest and the most effective. _
